Web Awesome 3.10.0 (@awesome.me/webawesome), MIT license (LICENSE.md
alongside). Vendored from the package's dist-cdn browser build: components
button, button-group, split-panel, tab, tab-group, tab-panel, drawer plus
their complete chunk import closure (57 chunks, resolved mechanically by
walking every import statement), and dist/styles/webawesome.css +
dist/styles/themes/default.css, plus dist/styles/utilities.css, layers.css,
and the COMPLETE CSS @import closure of webawesome.css and
themes/default.css (27 files including native.css and color/palettes —
resolved mechanically by walking @import statements, the same closure
discipline as the JS chunks). Consumed by the studio and player pages' chrome.
To re-vendor: npm install @awesome.me/webawesome@3.10.0, re-run the closure
walk (see the fix-batch15 vendor script in repo history), npm uninstall.
